libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment or system-property setup is required. Generated tests should target the 2.4.2 transitive Eclipse Sisu API; in particular, avoid carrying over the old three-argument QualifiedTypeBinder.hear call and use the available two-argument form instead.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8718 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.sonatype.sisu:sisu-inject-bean:2.4.2; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact has optional JUnit 4, TestNG, SLF4J, and OSGi dependencies, but they are only needed if tests deliberately exercise those optional/deprecated integration surfaces; core bean scanning, binding, URLClassSpace, and SisuGuice coverage is reachable without them.
Existing 2.4.0 tests may need source updates for API signature changes when run against 2.4.2.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed for meaningful Sisu Inject Bean coverage; the observed failure is API drift in the existing test, not missing setup.
